subject: FW: Back to NYC
body:
From: Freja Langert-Gidén [mailto:freja@swedishamericanlifescience.com] 
Sent: Monday, June 09, 2008 3:30 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Back to NYC

 

Hey Lesley,

Hope all is well, I hear you're having some tropical heat in the city at the moment! 
As I spoke to J about a while ago, I will be back in NYC June 16th- July 14th and was wondering if there was any possibilty of staying at 66th street any part of the time. Have you heard anything about this? I would be so grateful if you could let me know so I can start making other inquiries if needed. 

Thanks for your help Lesley!

Freja


Freja Langert-Gidén
Project Coordinator
Swedish-American Life Science Summit, SALSS
Tel: +46 (0)702 79 25 24
www.swedishamericanlifescience.com
